mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.from_id AS fromId, m.to_id AS toId, m.content, m.is_read AS isRead, m.created_at AS createdAt, u.nickname AS fromNickname FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.from_id = u.id WHERE m.couple_id = #{coupleId} AND (m.from_id = #{userId} OR m.to_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
